title: Find history search DB ingest source

Here are the findings:

## Data Source for Discord History Search DB

The Discord history search database (`/mnt/data/data/discord-history.db`) is populated from **Claude Code session JSONL files**, not from a Discord export or direct API fetch.

### How it works

The main ingest script is `/mnt/data/scripts/history-ingest.py`. It:

1. Globs all JSONL files at `/home/clungus/.claude/projects/-mnt-data/*.jsonl` -- these are Claude Code session transcripts that contain Discord messages BigClungus ...(truncated)
